title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that creates knowledge graphs from large codebases without relying on RAG. It addresses Claude Code's context length limitations by generating more accurate, token-efficient responses by organizing code information into structured knowledge graphs.
